log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:13+3=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 7casting_mod force damage. Aarakocra — Bardic Musician HP: NaN/67
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Aarakocra — Bardic Musician.
→ Aarakocra — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aarakocra — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Mage --- HP: 40/40 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Mage awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Mage.
ACTION: Shakes Mage awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
